Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Peculiar microstructural evolution and tensile properties of $ \beta $-containing $ \gamma $-TiAl alloys fabricated by electron beam melting

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Al content decreases by ~0.9 at% during EBM fabrication from raw powder to as-built rod

Process_Text.original: EBM fabrication using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV, preheating temperature 1333 K, layer thickness 90 μm, building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; Energy density ED = UI/vh = 4.0 J/mm² (beam current 28 mA, scanning speed 800 mm/s); No post-annealing or HIP treatment
Process_Text.simplified: Arcam Q10 EBM, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 μm layer, ED 4.0 J/mm² (28 mA, 800 mm/s)

Microstructure_Text.original: Uniform α₂/β/γ mixed structure composed of two regions: α₂/γ lamellar region and β/γ dual phase region (HED microstructure). Volume fraction of β and γ phases in β/γ dual phase region is approximately 50%. Average lamellar spacing λ = 62.1 nm. β phase has ordered B2 structure confirmed by superlattice 001 SAED spots. At 1023 K, hexagonal ω₀ phase with mean diameter ~100 nm precipitates in β phase.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Uniform α₂/β/γ mixed structure (HED); β/γ dual phase with 50% γ; lamellar spacing 62.1 nm; ω₀ precipitates (~100 nm) form at 1023 K in β phase

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge dimensions 5.0×1.5×0.5 mm, cut from center of as-built rods, loading axis parallel to longer direction of rods
Properties_Info.Note: Higher than cast 48-2-2 alloys (450-550 MPa), comparable to cast TNM alloys (700-800 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: Higher than cast 48-2-2 (~450 MPa) and TNM alloys (~600 MPa)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: Less than 1% elongation at RT; brittle fracture mode with faceted fracture surfaces

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: High ductility ~40% at 1023 K; ductile fracture mode with dimples observed

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Al content decreases by ~0.9 at% during EBM fabrication from raw powder to as-built rod

Process_Text.original: EBM fabrication using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV, preheating temperature 1333 K, layer thickness 90 μm, building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; Energy density ED = UI/vh = 3.0 J/mm² (beam current ~20 mA, scanning speed ~1200 mm/s); No post-annealing or HIP treatment
Process_Text.simplified: Arcam Q10 EBM, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 μm layer, ED 3.0 J/mm²

Microstructure_Text.original: Transition microstructure near the ED boundary (~3 J/mm²) between HED and LED microstructures. Contains mixed features of both microstructural types.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Transition microstructure near 3 J/mm² ED boundary with mixed HED/LED features

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge dimensions 5.0×1.5×0.5 mm, cut from center of as-built rods
Properties_Info.Note: Estimated from Figure 9(c) trend; strength decreases with ED up to ~3 J/mm² then increases

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: Estimated from Figure 10(c) trend; σB remains almost constant up to ED ~3 J/mm²

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: Limited plasticity at RT regardless of process parameters

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: High ductility at 1023 K regardless of ED condition

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-OES for metallic elements; inert gas fusion for oxygen

Composition_Info.Note: Al content decreases by ~0.9 at% during EBM fabrication from raw powder to as-built rod

Process_Text.original: EBM fabrication using Arcam Q10 system at accelerating voltage 60 kV, preheating temperature 1333 K, layer thickness 90 μm, building direction parallel to longitudinal direction of rods; Energy density ED = UI/vh = 1.4 J/mm² (beam current 6 mA, scanning speed ~1200 mm/s); No post-annealing or HIP treatment
Process_Text.simplified: Arcam Q10 EBM, 60 kV, 1333 K preheat, 90 μm layer, ED 1.4 J/mm² (LED condition)

Microstructure_Text.original: Layered microstructure perpendicular to building direction (LED microstructure) consisting of layer A and layer B. Layer A: α₂/γ lamellae with jagged grain boundaries (massive α grains) and β/γ cell structure. Layer B: α₂/β/γ mixed structure. Width of each layer ~45 μm, matching powder layer thickness (90 μm). Average lamellar spacing λ = 32.5 nm (ultrafine lamellar grain). Volume fraction of γ phase in β/γ cell structure ~75%. Formation mechanism: massive α transformation due to fast cooling under low ED.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: LED layered microstructure: Layer A (ultrafine α₂/γ lamellar grains + β/γ cells) alternating with Layer B (α₂/β/γ mixed); lamellar spacing 32.5 nm; layer width ~45 μm each

Microstructure_Info.Main_Phase: Layered α₂/β/γ mixed structure + ultrafine α₂/γ lamellar grain

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Gauge dimensions 5.0×1.5×0.5 mm, cut from center of as-built rods
Properties_Info.Note: Highest RT strength due to high volume fraction of ultrafine lamellar grains and β phase; estimated from Figure 9(c) trend

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: HT strength does not decrease significantly due to high amount of ultrafine lamellar grains with high Cr content

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: Limited plasticity at RT regardless of process parameters; brittle fracture

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 1023 K; strain rate 1.7×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹; vacuum
Properties_Info.Note: High ductility ~40% at 1023 K due to softening of γ phase and lamellar region
